subject: papeis inapa - deemed isda confo; final version

emails.subject: Re: Papeis Inapa - deemed ISDA confo; final version
emails.subject_base: Papeis Inapa - deemed ISDA confo; final version
emails.body: Yes, please call. I actually commented to Edmund on this confirm last Friday and he apparently took none of my suggestions. Sara From: Mark Elliott on 08/03/99 05:46 PM GDT

emails.subject: Re: Papeis Inapa - deemed ISDA confo; final version
emails.subject_base: Papeis Inapa - deemed ISDA confo; final version
emails.body: Re: Papeis Inapa deemed ISDA confo; final version Sara, Per my last e-mail on the Papeis Inapa deal, herewith for your complete information a copy of the final form of Deemed ISDA Confirmation very helpfully drwan up by Edmund Cooper in London to document the trade between EEFT (for ECTRIC) and Papeis Inapa. May be when you get a few minutes, we can have a chat just to confirm the Enron entities involved in paper deals in Europe as there appear to be certain people in London who are a little confused on this issue. Kind regards Mark Edmund Cooper 08/03/99 02:26 PM
